label: Us Cross Sectional Momentum
description: Classic 12-1 momentum (Jegadeesh & Titman 1993), long-only top-decile proxy: FF Mkt+0.5×Mom. Monthly, 5bps/side. (Jensen/Kelly per-stock dataset is 68GB — factor proxy per todo log.)
reference: Jegadeesh & Titman (1993), 'Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers'
